hooks.command: SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); TITLE="Claude Code${SESSION:+ [$SESSION]}"; osascript -e "display notification \"Needs your attention\" with title \"$TITLE\""; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff

SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); TITLE="Claude Code${SESSION:+ [$SESSION]}"; osascript -e "display notification \"Done\" with title \"$TITLE\""; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Funk.aiff
